title: Partial index gives incorrect query result
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t3(e INTEGER, f TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'default');
CREATE TABLE t4(g DOUBLE, h INTEGER CHECK(h > 0));
CREATE INDEX i4 ON t4(g) WHERE h=5;
SELECT * FROM t3 JOIN t4 ON t3.e = t4.h WHERE t4.h > 0;
key_bug_features: Partial index on t2 causes incorrect query results
